use_codes.desc: METHOD OF DECREASING THE PRODUCTION OF A-BETA USING A COMPOSITION WHICH DECREASES BLOOD CHOLESTEROL IN PATIENTS AT RISK OF OR EXHIBITING SYMPTOMS OF ALZHEIMER'S DISEASE

indications.text:
Altoprev is indicated:
• To reduce the risk of myocardial infarction, unstable angina, and coronary
revascularization procedures in adults at high risk for coronary heart disease.
• As an adjunct to diet to reduce low-density lipoprotein cholesterol (LDL-C) and slow the
progression of coronary ather...
